Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Feat: Implement Fattoria seed and master admin auto-assignment

This commit includes:

1. **Fattoria Pizzeria Seed**
   - Added utils/seed_fattoria.go with complete seed data
   - Support for --restaurant=fattoria flag in cmd/seed/main.go
   - Created bash script tools/scripts/seed/run_seed_fattoria.sh
   - Includes 9 products (5 pizzas + 4 beverages) with full details

2. **Project Reorganization**
   - Moved all documentation to docs/ with subfolders
   - Created docs_seeds/ for seed-specific documentation
   - Organized scripts in tools/scripts/
   - Created navigation READMEs in each folder
   - Kept root clean with only README.md, CLAUDE.md, STRUCTURE.md

3. **Master Admin Auto-Assignment (Business Rule)**
   - Modified handler/organization.go CreateOrganizationBootstrap()
   - Implemented addMasterAdminsToOrganization() helper function
   - Master admins (pablo, luan, eduardo) automatically added to new orgs
   - Idempotent design - safe to run multiple times
   - Includes comprehensive documentation in docs/guides/MASTER_ADMIN_ACCESS.md

4. **Documentation**
   - docs/seed/SEED_ARCHITECTURE.md - Explains bootstrap flow and multi-tenant architecture
   - docs/guides/MASTER_ADMIN_ACCESS.md - Business rule documentation
   - docs_seeds/fattoria/ - Complete Fattoria seed documentation with examples

All code compiles successfully and follows project conventions.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
